title: Proclamation No. 1936, s. 1979
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1936

AMENDING PROCLAMATION NO. 1722, DATED MARCH 17, 1979 WHICH TRANSFERRED CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL NORTE, ISLAND OF MINDANAO, BY CORRECTING THE TECHNICAL DESCRIPTIONS THEREOF TO CONFORM WITH THE APPROVED SURVEY

Upon recommendation of the Minister of Natural Resources, and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby amend Proclamation No. 1722, dated March 17, 1979 which transferred certain parcels of land of public domain to the Municipality of Panabo, Province of Davao del Norte, Island of Mindanao, by correcting the technical descriptions thereof to conform with the approved survey so as to read as follows:

A PARCEL OF LAND, Lot 313-B, Swo-11-00259, (being a portion of Lot 313, Psd-60302, LRC. CAD. REC. No. ……..), situated in the Barrio of Poblacion, Municipality of Panabo, Province of Davao, Island of Mindanao. Bounded as follows: On the SE., along lines 1-2-3 by Lot 315, Psd-60302; on the SW., along lines 3-4-5 by Lot 313-D of the subdivision plan; along lines 5-6-7 by Lot 313-A of the subdivision plan; along line 7-8 by Road; on the NW., along lines 8-9-10-11 by Lot 313-C on the subdivision plan; on the NE., along line 11-12 by Road; on the SE., along lines 12-13-14 by Lot 312, Psd-60302; along line 14-15 by Lot 311, Psd-60302; and along lines 15-16-1 by Lot 314, Psd-60302. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being S. 14 deg. 45 ‘W., 3303.53 m. from B.L.L.M. No. 69, Cad-276,

thence S. 88 deg. 00’W., 127.18 m. to point 2; thence S. 3 deg. 02’E., 124.36 m. to point 3; thence S. 23 deg. 17’W., 31.45 m. to point 4; thence N. 66 deg. 45’W., 155.22 m. to point 5; thence N. 66 deg. 45’W., 60.57 m. to point 6; thence N. 66 deg. 45’W., 84.78 m. to point 7; thence N. 66 deg. 45’W., 35.60 m. to point 8; thence N. 23 deg. 15’E., 185.43 m. to point 9; thence S. 66 deg. 45’E., 195.00 m. to point 10; thence N. 23 deg. 15’E., 406.97 m. to point 11; thence S. 68 deg. 16’E., 135.50 m. to point 12; thence S. 23 deg. 03’W., 197.12 m. to point 13; thence S. 66 deg. 50’E., 99.59 m. to point 14; thence S. 18 deg. 10’W., 48.82 m. to point 15; thence S. 24 deg. 49’W., 155.42 m. to point 16; thence N. 63 deg. 08’W., 34.76m. to point of beginning. Containing an area of ONE HUNDRED THIRTY FIVE THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED NINETY NINE (135,599) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: Points 3, 4,5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10 and 11 by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.; and the rest by PLS Cyl. Conc. Mons. Bearings true. Date of original survey, May 5-July 17, 1960, and that of the subdivision survey, October 15, 1979, by Geodetic Engineer Leonardo P. Cordero. Approved: Nov. 28, 1979.

A PARCEL OF LAND, Lot 334, Psd-60302, (being a portion of Matsuoka Plantation), situated in the Barrio of Poblacion, Municipality of Panabo, Province of Davao, Island of Mindanao. Bounded as follows: On the SE., along line 1-2 by Lot 302, Psd-60302; and on the SW., and NE., along lines 2-3-1 by Roads. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being S. 20 deg. 29’W., 2828.20 m. from B.L.L.M. No. 69, Cad-276, thence S. 24 deg. 57’W., 34.38 m. to point 2; thence N. 68 deg. 42’W., 99.04 m. to point 3; thence S. 87 deg. 25’E., 106.88 m. to point of beginning. Containing an area of ONE THOUSAND SIX HUNDRED NINETY NINE (1,699) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.L.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons. Bearings true. Date of subdivision survey, May 5-July 17, 1953, by A. Hernandez.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 26th day of December, in the year of Our Lord, Nineteen hundred and seventy-nine.

(SGD . )FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(SGD.) JUAN C. TUVERA Presidential Assistant

Source: CDAsia
